Hey Baby...

I know your mood is not okay. So I made this little page for you - not perfect, but completely from my heart.


Start the surprise

First, read this slowly

You are my favourite person even on angry days, silent days, and "do not talk to me" days. I may not always say everything perfectly, but I always choose you.

🏏 Our next partnership?
It has to be with you. No substitute, no bench, just you and me at the crease.
❤️ You are my beautiful innings.
The kind I want to play carefully, honestly, and till the last over.
😌 I am your Virat.
Be my Anushka - my calm, my smile, my whole stadium.
Next

Love Meter

This calculator is very serious. It will ask a few important questions before giving the result.

Question 1 😌

When I say “come here”, what should you do?

Good answer ❤️

Hug detected. Heart rate increased. Uffff… this is getting serious.

Next question: If we fight, who should melt first?

Aha, I knew it 😂

Angry outside, soft inside. Calculator is blushing now.

Next question: If I steal one kiss, what is the correct reaction?

Calculating... wait wait 😳

Checking smile level, hug pending balance, cute anger percentage, and how badly I miss you.

❤️🏏💋

System says: too much love. Please hold my hand to continue.

Uffff baby 🙈

This answer added extra romance points. Calculator is shy now.

💕🌹😌

Checking if your smile is still my weakness... result is obvious.

Final Love Report ❤️
100% + extra

Result: I am fully, badly, sweetly, and permanently stuck on you.

You are my favourite innings, my cutest distraction, my peaceful place, and my forever not-out partner.

Prize unlocked: one long hug, one forehead kiss, and maybe one naughty little “come here” when your mood is better 🙈

Puzzle

Mini Puzzle 🧩

Complete the sentence:

My favourite innings is _____.

Close, but cricket is only the game. You are the reason the game feels like a love story.

Correct ❤️

My favourite innings is you. Trophy nahi chahiye, bas tumhari smile chahiye.

Food is tempting, but you are the one I want to share every plate and every plan with.

Important Question

Very Important Question 😏

Who is the cutest girl in my whole world?

Correct ❤️

It is you, and I am not taking any review on this decision.

Perfect 😌

Definitely you - the cutest person and my most serious distraction.

Obviously 😂

Even third umpire would zoom in and say, "haan bhai, she is the one."

Best answer ❤️

All of the above, plus bonus points because you are mine.

Love Notes

Tap the love notes 💌

💌 Open

I know I annoy you, but my heart is always on your team.

💌 Open

Your smile fixes my mood faster than any win ever could.

💌 Open

You are special even when you are upset, maybe even more then.

💌 Open

I love your cute anger also, bas thoda discount de diya karo.

💌 Open

If life is a match, I want you as my opening partner and my last wicket too.

Find My Heart

Find My Heart 🎯

Only one heart has the real message.

This one is a practice ball. Try again, my little champion.

Almost there. My heart likes to create suspense.

You found it ❤️

You found my heart. Actually, you have had it for a long time.

Not this one, but your effort was very cute.

Wrong heart, right person. Try the middle one.

Photo Gallery

My Favourite Views 📸

Each picture has one small note from me.

That selfie still feels like a reminder: I look happiest when I am making something for you.

Your smile near that cake made the whole room feel softer.

The candles were bright, but you were the moment everyone should have noticed.

I was trying to look cool, but honestly I only look complete when you are around.

I may act strong, but with you my heart becomes very simple and soft.

Every normal meal becomes a date when you are sitting across from me.

That ice cream was sweet, but you still won without trying.

This look is dangerous; it can end any argument in two seconds.

Even the alpacas had main character energy, but you still stole the scene.

My favourite kind of picture will always be the one where we are in the same frame.

Car, mountains, blue sky, and you - that day felt like a small movie made for us.

The view was huge, but my eyes still wanted to find you first.

Even if you enter another world, I would still come looking for you there.

I want a lifetime of small moments where I can annoy you and still hold you close.

You look peaceful here, and somehow you become my peace too.

The waterfall was loud, but my heart was quietly saying your name.

You are the innings I want to play slowly, honestly, and till the last over.

Cold mountains, warm smile, and one memory I will keep replaying.

You beside the lake looked like the kind of scene I never want to skip.

Our next partnership will be with you - no last over, no retirement, only us.

Final Surprise

Open only if you love me ❤️

❤️

I choose you.

On good days, bad days, angry days, silent days, and "I do not want to talk" days - I still choose you.

Our next partnership will be with you. I am not leaving the pitch.

Your Virat is waiting for his Anushka 😌❤️
